title: Fauziya Hospital
heading: Facilities & Services
text:
Fauziya Hospital Home About us Consulting Doctor’s Treatment Events Contact Us Pay Online [email protected] - Make an Appointment It`s so fast 9930056004 [email protected] Fauziya Hospital LBS Marg, Kurla West Open 24 Hours Monday to Sunday Home About us Consulting Doctor’s Treatment Events Contact Us Pay Online 9930056004 [email protected] Fauziya Hospital LBS Marg, Kurla West Open 24 Hours Monday to Sunday Fauziya Hospital is a very well-known hospital in the vicinity of Kurla West. Successfully established on 6th December, 1995, It is one of the well-known hospitals having 150 staff, 40 consulting doctors from different faculty. It has 62 beds, treats almost 4000 IPD patients and 36,000 OPD patients per year. Fauziya has an expert team of Consultants who are specifically trained in different subspecialties from some of the leading healthcare institute of India. It’s a multi-speciality hospital from different faculties like General Medicine, General Surgery, Gynaecology and Obstetrics, ENT, Orthopaedics, Ophthalmology. Provides 24 X 7 care to all the sections of the society at a very economical cost with all modern arts of technology. Highly Experienced Doctor Family Care 24/7 Emergency Service Usman Lakdawala  (CEO) Dr. Deshmukh Anjum Khan  (Managing Director) Dr. Mohammed Usman Shaikh
